nasb.text: You shall make for it a grating of network of bronze, and on the net you shall make four bronze rings at its four corners.

esv.text: You shall also make for it a grating, a network of bronze, and on the net you shall make four bronze rings at its four corners.

cnv.text: 要為壇做一個銅網，網的四拐角上要做四個銅環。

ccb.text: 要造一个铜网，在铜网的四角装置四个铜环。
